text.p: It's so nice to hear from you. I really understand the fact that you're busy and i have been getting in touch with aunty , all along. I believe my getting in touch with her is getting in touch with you also.

We're on summer hols here and i have been busy working all the while. I met a sister here who told me she's your cousin. Her name is . She moved in from recently. Her email ad is I'm sure she'll be delighted to read from you.
How's aunty and the boys? My regards to them all. Greetings from guys here. Once again, thanks for keeping in touch. Bye.
